title: Consolidate Idle USDC to the ATMC’s Stablecoin Balance
body:
This proposal aims to move funds to yield-bearing accounts and optimize treasury management.

Key points:
- Transfer 2025 Events Budget (~1.04M USDC) to yield-bearing account
- Move remaining ARDC v2 funds (~1.5M USDC) to treasury
- Reallocate ADPC Security Subsidies funds

Timeline:
- Forum post: July 14th
- Vote period: July 24th - July 31st
- Implementation: By August 7th
